title: TipTapShow
description: A mod for Fabric to show your keystrokes ingame
body:
### What even is this?
I'm glad you asked. TipTapShow is a keystrokes mod but for newer versions of Minecraft/Fabric.

### Requirements
This mod *needs* Fabric API, please install it.
It also works very well with [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), you can edit the config without Cloth Config but I wouldn't recommend it.

### I hate the colors.
Well, good thing you can change all that in the config! Don't believe me? Check the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiptapshow/gallery)!

### Found a bug or want to suggest a feature?
Please head over to the [Github](https://github.com/Spyxar/TipTapShow/issues) and make an issue.

### The mod no work!!
Do you have Fabric API installed? No? Go get it.
If you have read the Requirements bit above and you have the Fabric API but it still doesn't work, please head to the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/EPFcHVjK8p) or to the [Github](https://github.com/Spyxar/TipTapShow/issues)
